svg.aria-label: Manchester United attacking distribution: Amorim vs Carrick

g.text: Every Manchester United player in the league windows for Ruben Amorim and Michael Carrick
Bruno's xA share jumped from 20.8% to 54.3%.
Top three creators rose from 44.8% to 75.9% of team xA.
Mainoo logged 895 minutes under Carrick but only 0.44 xG+xA.
Casemiro under Carrick: 3.0 goals, 2.42 xG, 0.66 xA.

svg.text: Data source: Understat | Windows: Amorim Jul 1, 2025 to Jan 5, 2026; Carrick Jan 13, 2026 to Apr 6, 2026
